title: JVL Eco-Friendly Latex Backed Coir Entrance Doormat, 45x75cm - Floral
features: The 'Floral' design is a charming addition to your home’s entrance
Premium materials, made from 100% natural coir (coconut fibres) with rubber latex backing The coconut fibres provide a strong surface to trap dirt as you scrape keeping your floor cleaner for longer

Our coir is mechanically twisted for less shedding, the coir fibres stay on your mat and not on the floor 15mm pile depth means the coir will deep get into the soles of boots and shoes while the rubber latex backing reduces risk of slipping when wiping your feet

100% biodegradable – when the mat comes to the ends of its life and it is ready to be replaced, the mats are biodegradable so great for the planet Natural coir will disintegrate with one year and the latex compound will disintegrate within five years, subject to soil conditions The coir mat is long lasting and durable making the doormat suitable for use in all weathers

Easy to maintain, simply shake or brush to clean Our packaging is recyclable too Suitable for indoor and outdoor use Size: 45x75cm approx. Please note, colours may vary slightly from the pictures shown as this is a natural product. Some shedding may occur when new.

specifications_table.Room Type: Entryway, Guest Room, Hallway, Home Office, Kitchen
